data.description:
audits/ (Makefile.audit, _audit_lib.sh, audit_dd1-dd5) was the dso bootstrap-phase-gate audit pipeline. Evidence: only inbound reference repo-wide is its own test tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/audits/test_audit_dd3_mutation_caps.py; nothing invokes make -f Makefile.audit (the 'audit' hits in reconcile.py are the unrelated _audit_log_probe).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] src/rebar/_engine/rebar_reconciler/audits/ + tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/audits/ deleted
- [ ] Full suite green
data.title: Delete test-locked orphan: rebar_reconciler/audits/ dso bootstrap audit pipeline
